data.content: Planning complete for stale beat grooming. Created children foolery-36d2 (overview rail), foolery-6b74 (AI review jobs), and foolery-3b78 (controls/status), linked from parent foolery-3d0f. Recommended first implementation uses trigger-level explicit agent selection plus optional model override, not a new persistent dispatch action, and stores advisory results with decisions `still_do`, `reshape`, and `drop`. No implementation files were changed in this planning action.
